designSystem.fontFamily: -apple-system, 'SF Pro Display', 'SF Pro Text', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing with dark/light themes, OLED-friendly dark mode, gradient accents, and gamification-driven UI with streak cards and progress indicators

features.sparkDeck: Personalized feed of creative sparks with ignite buttons and kudos rewards
features.ignitionEngine: Spark detail view with participation stats, difficulty, and ignite CTA
features.accountabilityCircles: Private groups with progress bars, member avatars, and nudge actions
features.kudosAndStreak: Gamified streak counter with weekly progress bar and total kudos tracking
features.creativeChronicle: Portfolio of completed sparks with feedback counts and share functionality
